appraisal_events.evidence: « Tandis qu’avec Mme de Villeparisis ou Robert de Saint-Loup, j’eusse démontré par mes paroles beaucoup plus de plaisir que je n’en eusse ressenti, car je les quittais avec fatigue… »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator explicitly contrasts his draining, insincere pleasure with Saint-Loup (and Mme de Villeparisis) to the genuine, abundant joy he feels among the girls, locally diminishing their value as companions.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally devalued as tiring company who elicits feigned rather than felt pleasure.
